statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Microsoft Learn: Guidance on configuring system services - Print Scan Broker Service
links.summary: This Microsoft Learn services page remains the intended official guidance source for Print Scan Broker Service, but this review pass did not re-capture a machine-checkable exact row for `PrintScanBrokerService` from the live page. Treat it as historical guidance context until the exact service entry is captured again.

links.title: Local SCM snapshot - PrintScanBrokerService
links.summary: Checked-in `sc qc PrintScanBrokerService` snapshot from Microsoft Windows 11 Pro 10.0.26200 confirming the exact service identifier, display name, binary path, and current START_TYPE line on the review host. This proves the exact SCM control surface the app targets.

links.title: Current app implementation
links.summary: The provider disables the `PrintScanBrokerService` service through the batch service start-mode tweak.
